reviews.comment:
Las YPF no decepcionan,siempre están limpias y tienen buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
YPF stations never disappoint; they are always clean and have good service.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien atendido, los baños impecables y el "sandwich de jamón crudo con pan casero" *5 estrellas*

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, spotless bathrooms, and the "prosciutto sandwich with homemade bread" was *5 stars*

reviews.comment:
Buena atención , buena predisposición de los plateros, baños prolijos. En medio entre Esquel y Trelew

(Translated by Google)
Good service, helpful staff, clean bathrooms. Conveniently located between Esquel and Trelew.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMGJtRVBnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es nuestra parada fija cada vez que viajamos de la costa a cordillera y viceversa... Agua para mate gratis, combustible, baños en buen estado SIEMPRE, buena atención, Wifi gratis (es genial, ya que la mayoría de las líneas de celular no tienen señal allí o al menos no tienen Internet móvil para comunicarse con allegados y dar actualizaciones del viaje o lo que se necesite)..

(Translated by Google)
It's our regular stop every time we travel from the coast to the mountains and vice versa... Free water for mate, fuel, bathrooms in good condition ALWAYS, good service, free Wi-Fi (it's great, since most cell phone lines don't have a signal there or at least don't have mobile internet to communicate with relatives and give updates on the trip or whatever is needed).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCZ3ZISWxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El viejo verso de No hay sistema para no aceptar tarjetas y no cargar los puntos Serviclub y encima representa al ACA

(Translated by Google)
The old saying "There's no system to not accept cards and not load Serviclub points" and on top of that, it represents the ACA (Argentine Automobile Club).
